project_share_invite_existing.subject: {{inviterName}} invited you to collaborate on "{{projectTitle}}"
project_share_invite_existing.description: Sent when a project owner invites an existing Writual user to collaborate

project_share_invite_new.subject: You're invited to join Writual and collaborate on "{{projectTitle}}"
project_share_invite_new.description: Sent when a project owner invites a non-user to collaborate

project_share_accepted.subject: {{collaboratorName}} joined "{{projectTitle}}"
project_share_accepted.description: Sent to project owner when a pending invite is claimed on signup

permission_updated.subject: Your access to "{{projectTitle}}" has been updated
permission_updated.description: Sent when a collaborator's permission level or aspects are changed

password_reset.subject: Reset your Writual password
password_reset.description: Sent when a user requests a password reset

email_verification.subject: Verify your Writual email address
email_verification.description: Sent when a user needs to verify their email address

feature_announcement.subject: New in Writual: {{featureName}}
feature_announcement.description: Sent to announce new product features

beta_invite.subject: You're invited to Writual Beta
beta_invite.description: Sent to users selected for beta access

subscription_receipt.subject: Your Writual subscription receipt
subscription_receipt.description: Sent after a successful subscription payment

trial_expiring.subject: Your Writual trial ends in {{daysLeft}} days
trial_expiring.description: Sent as the trial period approaches expiration

payment_failed.subject: Action required: Writual payment failed
payment_failed.description: Sent when a recurring payment fails
